name: github-copilot-llm-gateway
description: Connect GitHub Copilot to open-source models via vLLM or any OpenAI-compatible server

chatParticipants.name: llm-gateway
chatParticipants.description: Stats, presets, config, and changelog for your LLM Gateway

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Server stats, speed, and context usage

commands.name: presets
commands.description: List all sampling presets with parameters

github.copilot.llm-gateway.serverUrl.description: Inference server URL (OpenAI API compatible endpoint)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.apiKey.description: API key for authentication (optional, leave empty if not required)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.requestTimeou.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. For streaming requests this applies until the initial HTTP response begins; use streamingIdleTimeout for gaps between streamed chunks.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.defaultMaxTok.description: Default maximum input tokens for models (context window)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.defaultMaxOut.description: Default maximum output tokens for models

github.copilot.llm-gateway.enableToolCal.description: Enable tool calling capability for models

github.copilot.llm-gateway.parallelToolC.description: Allow model to call multiple tools in parallel (disable if model has issues with parallel calls)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.agentTemperat.description: Temperature for agent/tool calling mode (lower = more consistent tool call formatting). Set to 0.0 for best results with fine-tuned models.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.toolExcludePa.description: Regex patterns to exclude tools by name. Each pattern is tested against tool names.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.streamingIdle.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the next streaming chunk before timing out after streaming has started. Increase for slow local models. Set to 0 to disable the idle chunk timeout.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed API requests (5xx errors).

github.copilot.llm-gateway.retryDelay.description: Base delay in milliseconds between retry attempts. Uses exponential backoff.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.systemPrompt.description: System prompt to prepend to every conversation. Leave empty to use the default behavior.

default: (?:You are (?:an expert )?AI programming assistant,\s*)?working with a user in the VS Code editor\.
When asked for your name, you must respond with (?:\\?")?GitHub Copilot(?:\\?")?\.
When asked about the model you are using, you must state that you are using [\s\S]*?(?:\\n|\r?\n|$)
Follow the user's requirements carefully\s*&\s*to the letter\.
If you are asked to generate content that is harmful, hateful, racist, sexist, lewd, or violent, only respond with (?:\\?")?Sorry, I can't assist with that(?:\\?")?\.?
github.copilot.llm-gateway.promptStripPa.description: Regex patterns stripped from non-tool prompt text before requests are sent to the model.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.activePreset.description: Active sampling preset name. Controls temperature, top_p, min_p, repeat_penalty, and other sampling parameters sent per-request. Must match a preset filename (without .json) in the presets directory. Use 'LLM Gateway: Select Sampling Preset' command for quick switching.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.presetsPath.description: Directory path for sampling preset JSON files. Each preset is a separate .json file you can edit directly. Leave empty to use default (~/.config/llm-gateway/presets/). Supports ~ for home directory.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.showThinking.description: Show model's thinking/reasoning process in a collapsible section before the response. When disabled, thinking is logged to output channel only.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.reasoningBudg.description: Global reasoning/thinking token budget override. null = use preset or server default; 0 = disable thinking; -1 = unlimited; positive = max thinking tokens. Use 'LLM Gateway: Select Reasoning Budget' command for quick switching.

enumDescriptions: Force reasoning_format=deepseek — stream thinking as separate reasoning_content (use when your model supports <think> but template is not auto-detected)
Force reasoning_format=none — disable thinking separation entirely
github.copilot.llm-gateway.reasoningForm.description: How to handle model thinking/reasoning in streaming responses. 'auto' detects from the server's chat template. Set to 'deepseek' to force thinking separation for models like Qwen3 running with generic ChatML template.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.contextConden.description: Context usage percentage at which automatic LLM-based conversation condensation is triggered. Older messages are summarized by the model to free context space. Set to 95 to effectively disable.
